herbs.herb_desc: Acorus calamus decoction, also known as calamus tea, is a traditional herbal remedy prepared from the roots of the sweet flag plant (Acorus calamus). This decoction has been used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for centuries to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, anxiety, and respiratory issues. The active compounds in acorus calamus, such as asarone and linalool, are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, contributing to its medicinal benefits.
